[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-international-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_column_text]

A honeymoon is much more than just a couple’s first post-wedding getaway. It’s an opportunity for them to connect as a couple and also an opportunity to take a quick break from the wedding planning. At ATW Travels, we’re committed to making your romantic vacation worth cherishing for a lifetime. We offer budget-friendly all-inclusive honeymoon packages to over a hundred destinations across the world. You don’t have to lift a finger during the entire trip – we’ll take care of everything.

[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Is Maldives an Ideal Honeymoon Destination?”][vc_column_text]

The Maldives is a picture-perfect island that offers the best of everything – luxurious accommodation, delectable cuisine, fun activities, and plenty of natural attractions. There can be no better way to spend your romantic holiday than in the backdrop of beautiful white sandy beaches, turquoise lagoons, and a vibrant coral reef. Wouldn’t you love a candlelight dinner at the beach while enjoying nature or on a cruise while admiring the sunset and sipping champagne? If your idea of a romantic getaway includes sun, sand, and romance, call now to book Maldives honeymoon packages from ATW Travels.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”20217″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Top Tips to Remember When Choosing Maldives Honeymoon Packages”][vc_column_text]

At ATW Travels, we’re here to take the stress out of planning your honeymoon. We’ll take care of everything from ticket booking and visa arrangements to accommodation and food. And if you have special requests to surprise your partner, we’ll arrange that as well!

But, to make your vacation extra special, here are a few things you must remember before choosing a romantic Maldives honeymoon tour package. We’ve listed them for you:

  • Seaplanes and boats are the only means of transport between islands. Ask your tour operator if they can book a resort close to Male, the island country’s capital city. And remember to check if the package includes a complimentary airport transfer.
  • Make sure you book the package in the right season – The Maldives experiences rain season from May to October.
  • Some islands have their time zones, so remember to check with the resort when catching the flight or during departure.

Or, you could skip all of these issues and book all-inclusive Maldives honeymoon packages from ATW Travels. We’ll suggest the right season, check with the resort regarding time zones, and arrange for seaplane/boat transfer as well. All you need to do is let us know your needs, and we’ll arrange them for you. Fill in the inquiry form on the website, send an email, or call us directly with your queries.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How Much Does a Maldives Honeymoon Package Cost?”][vc_column_text]

Typically, Maldives honeymoon packages range from INR 20,000 to INR 50,000 depending on the number of days, itinerary, accommodation is chosen, etc. But the cost is fairly cheap compared to all the beauty you’ll be experiencing and all the fantastic memories you’ll make.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are the Some Popular Attractions Included in Most Honeymoon Packages?”][vc_column_text]

The Maldives is known for its clear turquoise waters, white sandy beaches, stunning corals, and peaceful ambiance. Every island in the country has its scenic beauty and charm, and every island represents a style that best suits your personality.

  • Kandolhu Maldives: Best for Honeymooners
  • Kagi Maldives Spa Island: Best for Eudemonia
  • Velassaru Maldives: Best for Romance
  • Kurumba Beach: Ideal for scuba diving, spa, and other fun activities
  • Cocoa Island Beaches: Famous for coral reefs and scuba diving activities
  • Hulhumale Beach: Ideal for paddle boarding, snorkeling, scuba diving, etc.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Is the Best Time to Visit the Maldives for Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

The Maldives is an excellent place to visit for most of the year, but the months between April to November are the wet season where the weather could get nasty, but there will likely be dry spells between these months as well. This is the time to look for off-season Maldives honeymoon packages. The perfect time to visit this beautiful country is from December to April. February is especially pleasant with plenty of sunshine, and the weather is warm.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_empty_space height=”80px” el_class=”removeheight” css=”.vc_custom_1644654455256{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1643784959089{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

+91 9693339999

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1653551265753{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Dream Vacay Today!

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why Is ATW Travels the Best Travel Partner?”][vc_column_text]

A honeymoon is the most intimate and wholesome affair of a couple’s life. Nobody understands this better than us! Over the years, we’ve curated some of the best Maldives packages for couples at various price levels.

We know what’s best for you and strive to make everything perfect for this new start of your lives. At ATW Travels, we promise a 100% safe and secure vacation. Call now if you’d like to co-create unique experiences that will take your holiday to the next level.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”20216″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Makes the Maldives the Most Special Island in The Indian Ocean?”][vc_column_text]

The Maldives is a tropical paradise home to some of the most stunning beaches in the world. The country is a chain of 1,200 islands clustered to form atolls and surrounded by calm lagoons that host some of the world’s best overwater bungalows. The coral waters make the country an ideal snorkeling destination, while the tiny organisms in the shoals give off a bioluminescence blue glow at night, making an evening stroll romantic.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What Are Some of The Best Places to Visit in The Maldives for A Honeymoon?”][vc_column_text]

It’s not every day that you get to be surrounded by sparkling waters and clear beaches. Everything about the Maldives is wonderful, but some places stand out more than others.

Here are some of the things you can do to enhance your holiday experience:

  • Visit bioluminescent beaches to witness the wonder of nature and enjoy an evening stroll beside beaches that glow.
  • Join a wellness spa. Get rejuvenated at a couple’s spa and bask in the tranquillity of the retreat.
  • Take a seaplane ride to enjoy the panoramic view of the crystal-clear water, stingrays, and dolphins.
  • Go for a romantic underwater dinner at some of the best underwater restaurants in the Maldives to enjoy a 180-degree view of the ocean while you eat.

There’s so much more than the Maldives has to offer, including beautiful cruise rides, fishing experiences, admirable museums, and gorgeous marine life.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_single_image image=”20215″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How To Find Some of The Best Beach Resorts in the Maldives?”][vc_column_text]

The Maldives has some of the world’s best luxury resorts that offer the best facilities money can buy. There’s something for everyone, from underwater restaurants and overwater bungalows to water sports. Here are some of the best resorts in the Maldives:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Gili Lankanfushi” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Revel in the luxurious overwater eco-resort with 46 villas equipped with open decks to provide the best sea view experience.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Hurawalhi Island Resort” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This resort is surrounded by a beautiful lagoon and is home to the world’s largest underwater restaurant.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Milaidhoo Islands” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Swim with mantas on this exotic and stylish island created for couples.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Baros” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

Tucked in a beautiful private island, it’s the perfect getaway for couples young and old.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Anantara Veli Maldives Resort” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][vc_column_text]

This is an adults-only resort that offers a stunning view of the lagoon and is a perfect place to spend a holiday with your loved one.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

The Maldives is truly a paradise in disguise and undoubtedly the most romantic destination for couples. Escape to this out-of-the-world island to enhance your romantic experience and make this trip a worthwhile memory with exclusive Maldives honeymoon packages from ATW Travels.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

FAQs about Maldives Honeymoon

What Is the Best Time to Honeymoon in The Maldives?
Being tropical heaven, it is best to visit the Maldives during summers, so you can take advantage of everything the island offers.
Which Is the Best Month to Visit the Maldives?
To best enjoy the weather and all the water activities, the months from December to April are ideal for visiting the Maldives.
How Many Days Are Enough for The Maldives Trip?
4-5 days are usually more than enough to explore the beautiful island, but you can certainly stay longer to bask in some sunshine.
Is Maldives Safe for Honeymoon Couples?
The Maldives is a hotspot tourist destination for couples, which makes it absolutely safe for them and anyone else looking to have a relaxing time in the country.
How Can I Reach the Maldives?
You can either take a flight or embark on a cruise to reach the Maldives. There are a couple of options from the port to get your resort. Boats, domestic flights, seaplanes, speedboats are all available at your disposal to safely transport you to your destination.
How Can I Travel Within the Maldives?
The best way to reach your destination in the Maldives is to walk. It’s cheap, easy, and takes little to no time since every destination is within a walkable distance.
Visa Requirements for International Travelers Visiting the Maldives
Indians do not need a pre-arrival visa but must carry valid documents, including a valid passport, hotel reservations, and confirmed return tickets. You can apply for a 30-day tourist visa at the Male Airport and even extend it up to 90 days after approval from relevant authorities.
